rubrics.name: Asset Integrity
rubrics.description: Structural, integrity, and trust validation checks against the C2PA 2.x spec.

rubrics.name: Asset Conformance 0.1 · Spec 2.2
rubrics.description: Full conformance rubric (integrity + structural + spec-compliance checks) for C2PA Spec 2.2, conformance profile 0.1.

rubrics.name: Asset Conformance 0.2 · Spec 2.2
rubrics.description: Full conformance rubric for C2PA Spec 2.2, conformance profile 0.2 (adds the mandatory specVersion check).

rubrics.name: Asset Conformance 0.2 · Spec 2.4
rubrics.description: Full conformance rubric for C2PA Spec 2.4 (conformance profile 0.2). Strictest variant.

rubrics.name: Asset Signals (Local)
rubrics.description: Detects inception and transformation signals on each manifest (e.g. captured media, GenAI transformations).
